title: Composite YAML policy
command:
metadata:
  id: CUSTOM_2
  name: S3 encryption and versioning
definition:
  and:
    - cond_type: attribute
      resource_types:
        - aws_s3_bucket
      attribute: versioning.enabled
      operator: is_true
    - cond_type: attribute
      resource_types:
        - aws_s3_bucket
      attribute: server_side_encryption_configuration
      operator: exists
